testcase.name: verifyEmptyFieldsLogin[, ](1)

failure.message: Login should work with empty fields (Intentional Failure 2) expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.name: verifyEmptyPasswordLogin

failure.message: Login should work without a password (Intentional Failure 3) expected [true] but found [false]
